name: Agency Agents
description: Downloads agency-agents from msitarzewski repos and runs convert/install with auto-detection by default.

tool.description: Tool name passed to ./scripts/install.sh --tool <tool>. Use 'auto' for --parallel auto-detection.

create-agentsmd.description: If true, writes AGENTS.md from msitarzewski/AGENT-ZERO to the workspace root on container creation (always overwrites).
